# Dashboard Capture Checklist

Use this checklist when capturing StockRipper dashboards, reports, or terminal summaries.

- Capture the same scenario with the same seed data and run ID.
- Record the visible evidence, confidence, risk gate result, and order status.
- Verify that charts, tables, and summaries remain legible at the target viewport.
- Save the capture with a descriptive name that includes the scenario and run context.
